category_sources: source_facts.description identifies ccls as a language server for C, C++, Objective-C, and Objective-C++.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name gives ccls; source_facts.homepage official repository uses ccls.
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage is official GitHub repository; official GitHub wiki and README are documentation surfaces.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already has an official repository value; per instruction repo returned as null.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies language-server support for C-family languages; official README/wiki document LSP features.
